Grand Armor Collection

A curated anthology of thirty legendary plate concepts. From the utilitarian strength of weathered iron to the ethereal glow of runic darksteel, these artifacts define the standard of high-imperial protection.

Polished Iron Plate

Tier I Common 85 DEF

Gilded Royal Armor

Tier IV Epic 210 DEF

Cursed Darksteel

Tier V Relic 245 DEF

Runic Vanguard

Tier III Rare 160 DEF

Frostbound Mail

Tier III Rare 145 DEF
